combat_history.event: First combat deployment of 4 Su-35S aircraft to Khmeimim Air Base for air superiority and ground attack missions
combat_history.significance: Demonstrated operational capability and effectiveness of Irbis-E radar and precision munitions in permissive environment

combat_history.event: Su-35S intercepts Israeli F-16I over Lebanon, forcing Israeli withdrawal without engaging targets in Syria
combat_history.significance: Showcased electronic warfare capabilities and willingness to challenge Israeli air operations

combat_history.event: Multiple Su-35S aircraft deployed for air superiority missions, several losses confirmed to Ukrainian SAMs including S-300 and NASAMS
combat_history.significance: Revealed vulnerability to integrated air defenses and highlighted maintenance/pilot training issues under sustained operations

combat_history.event: Su-35S conducting standoff missile strikes with R-37M against Ukrainian aircraft, claimed shoot-downs of MiG-29 and Su-27
combat_history.significance: Demonstrated long-range missile capability but also reluctance to operate within SAM-contested airspace

modernization.description: Software updates for improved multi-target tracking and electronic counter-countermeasures, integration with R-37M missile
modernization.impact: Enhanced BVR capability against stealth targets and improved survivability

modernization.description: Khibiny-M electronic warfare system upgrade with AI-assisted threat recognition and response
modernization.impact: Improved survivability against modern SAM systems and AESA radars

modernization.description: 117S engine modifications to extend TBO from 1000 to 1500 hours, improved thrust vectoring actuators
modernization.impact: Reduced maintenance burden and improved operational availability

vulnerabilities.description: Large RCS compared to stealth fighters, easily detected by modern AESA radars at extended ranges
vulnerabilities.context: Critical weakness against F-22, F-35, and advanced SAM systems like S-400 operated by adversaries
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Reliance on electronic warfare and standoff weapons, limited RCS reduction measures implemented

vulnerabilities.description: Complex thrust vectoring system requires extensive maintenance, limited availability of spare parts under sanctions
vulnerabilities.context: Ukrainian conflict exposed low sortie rates and difficulty maintaining operations under pressure
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Domestic production increase and simplified maintenance procedures being developed

vulnerabilities.description: Limited flight hours per pilot due to operating costs, insufficient training for complex EW environment operations
vulnerabilities.context: Western pilots typically fly 200+ hours annually vs Russian 100-120 hours, impacts proficiency in contested environments
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Increased simulator training and selective pilot programs for elite units

vulnerabilities.description: Less sophisticated data fusion compared to F-35 or Rafale, pilot workload remains high in multi-threat scenarios
vulnerabilities.context: Critical in modern air combat where information superiority determines engagement outcomes
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Software upgrades planned but limited by computing architecture

operational_patterns.typical_deployment: Air superiority patrols, standoff missile strikes, and defensive counter-air operations
operational_patterns.typical_task_group: Operates in pairs or flights of 4, often with A-50 AWACS support
operational_patterns.readiness_notes: Approximately 60-70% availability due to maintenance complexity and parts shortages under sanctions

peer_comparisons.key_differences: F-15EX has superior radar (APG-82 AESA) and avionics but lacks thrust vectoring; Su-35S has better maneuverability but larger RCS
peer_comparisons.video_angle: 4th gen+ shootout: raw performance vs technological sophistication

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Typhoon has smaller RCS and superior avionics integration; Su-35S has longer range and more powerful radar
peer_comparisons.video_angle: European vs Russian design philosophies in modern air combat

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Rafale excels in multi-role capability and sensor fusion; Su-35S dominates in air-to-air performance and payload
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Omni-role fighter vs air superiority specialist comparison

peer_comparisons.key_differences: F-22 has overwhelming stealth advantage and superior situational awareness; Su-35S relies on detection avoidance and long-range missiles
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Stealth vs super-maneuverability: 5th gen vs 4th gen+ evolution

peer_comparisons.key_differences: J-16 based on Su-30 with Chinese avionics and weapons; Su-35S has superior engines and flight performance
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Russian original vs Chinese evolution of Flanker design

images.title: Unsafe Unprofessional Interception of a U S Navy P8 by Russian SU-35s over the Mediterranean Sea (6221811).jpg
images.description: MEDITERRANEAN SEA (May 26, 2020) Two Russian Su-35 aircraft unsafely intercept a P-8A Poseidon patrol aircraft assigned to U.S. 6th Fleet over the Mediterranean Sea May 26, 2020. The intercept was det
